outlook.summary: 0DTE shows positive GEX (2.88B) keeping spot stable near Max Pain (6530). However, weekly (-0.71B) and monthly (-14.21B) negative GEX with extreme PCR (3.34) indicate heavy hedging. Flat skew masks bearish structural positioning. Spot trapped between immediate support 6550 and resistance 6600. Dealer hedging likely supports mean reversion to Max Pain zone.
